steps.title: Set up the daily rate
steps.content:
Average miles per day means total miles divided by total days.
$$\frac{1{,}950\text{ miles}}{100\text{ days}}$$

steps.title: Divide the distance by days
steps.content:
Compute the quotient.
$$\frac{1{,}950}{100}=19.5$$
So the butterfly traveled $19.5$ miles per day on average. The answer is C.
